about.metaDescription: Doğukan Özgan — an independent insurance agency based in Şişli/İstanbul. With multi-company agency, compares the most suitable offer in every branch.
about.heading: Your trusted advisor in insurance, right by your side
about.intro: Hello, I'm Doğukan Özgan. I'm an independent insurance advisor who works for your needs, not for a single insurance company.
about.p1: I serve across a broad range — from traffic and motor to health, from private pension to home and life insurance. By comparing offers from dozens of insurance companies one by one, I find the policy that best fits your budget and expectations.
about.p2: My goal isn't just to sell a policy; it's to explain the right coverage in plain language and to be there for you when a claim happens. I follow the process end to end and manage communication with the relevant insurer on your behalf.
about.p3: From my office in Mecidiyeköy / Şişli I also serve all of Türkiye remotely. For a question, a quote, or a second opinion on your existing policy — I'm always just a phone call or WhatsApp message away.
about.v1Body: I'm not tied to a single company. I compare 20+ insurers and recommend the one that suits you best.
about.v2Body: I explain coverages and exclusions in plain language; no surprise clauses.
about.v3Body: Once I receive your request, I call you or reach out on WhatsApp as soon as possible.
about.v4Title: By your side at claim time
about.v4Body: I don't sell a policy and disappear; I follow the claim process end to end on your behalf.
about.story1: For years I have worked in insurance as an advisor who stands by the client. Over that time I saw that what people really need isn't a policy; it's someone who asks the right questions, explains coverage plainly and stands behind it when needed.
about.story2: That's why, instead of staying tied to a single company, I chose the path of an independent agency. This lets me put your interest at the centre and compare market options impartially.
about.approachBody: I listen first: I won't offer a quote without understanding your needs, budget and priorities. Then I compare options in plain language and leave the decision to you. After the sale, I'm still with you throughout the process.
about.branchesBody: From your car to your health, your home to your future — I'm by your side for all your essential insurance needs.
about.companiesBody: I work with Türkiye's leading insurers and compare prices impartially for you.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Doğukan Özgan insurance agency: phone, WhatsApp, email and the office address in Mecidiyeköy / Şişli, İstanbul. Leave a callback request.

contact.intro: You can reach me by phone, WhatsApp or email, or leave a callback request below. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
